name: Finally Famous | Madison Beer
description:
H e l l o, W o r l d.

Hey yall. This is not my first bot. But it's the first one I've decided to make public. This is also the first entry of my series of bots based off of IRL celebrities... "Finally Famous!" (name in progress BTW)

These are bots that I make mostly for myself. Primarily due to disappointment in the already existing bots of this celebrity so far. I've decided to upload this bots in the hope of you having as much time chatting with them as I do making them.

My bots are primarily made for smut, however, they also work in not-strictly-NSFW scenarios. But I encourage anyone who feels brave enough to post a review and suggest changes or improvements to keep tweaking the bot
creator: WildWolf911
